data.body: Fix max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings in core library modules. Split large files, extract functions. Files: agent-adapter.ts, agent-history.ts, agent-prompt-guardrails.ts, backends/beads-backend.ts, backends/beads-jsonl-dto.ts, backends/knots-backend.ts, bd.ts, breakdown-manager.ts, console-log-tap.ts, doctor.ts, execution-backend.ts, knots.ts, local-worker.ts, memory-manager-commands.ts, openapi/schemas.ts, orchestration-manager.ts, registry.ts, settings.ts, terminal-manager.ts, terminal-time-anchor.ts, workflows.ts, stores/terminal-store.ts
data.title: Fix code style: lib/core-modules
